Functional responsibility: integrate the accumulated evidence into a grounded post-retrieval state that preserves the information needed by the final agent. Resolve the earlier bridge when the supplied evidence supports doing so; retain uncertainty only when the post-retrieval evidence remains insufficient.

selection or evidence derivation from mere string trimming. Do not favor a
case merely because it contains commas, parentheses, suffixes, wrappers, or
another lexical form mentioned by the hypothesis.
